sprint: Creator rendering bug fixes -- Hosted-by-Scene image backgrounds, Change Look modal size
task: Three real, user-reported bugs from a real Creator screenshot: a full-bleed decorative background rendered on top of the picture Holder instead of behind it, a zero-Place Builder Scene appeared to still show a Holder in Creator, and the Change Look screen took over the entire viewport. Two root-caused and fixed. (1) convergeSceneLayer() in tools/world-builder-v2/js/services/builder.js only ever sent a true Colour fill to the 'slide' compile target (rendered behind the Frame/Holder); an Image/Graphics/Text Experience explicitly Hosted by Scene fell through to 'overlay' (rendered on top of everything) regardless, since _syncUniversalContent() in projectModel.js never carried that choice onto the mirrored Layer for anything but Colour -- the Inspector's Hosted-By dropdown always offered all three hosts for any content type, it just silently did nothing for Image content until now. Fixed by stamping a new hostedByScene marker onto every mirrored Layer kind and having convergeSceneLayer() honour it the same way it already honours a Colour fill. Confirmed via a real headless Build + Creator import: the Holder's own placeholder now correctly renders on top of a Scene-hosted background image, pixel-sampled. (2) js/creationFlow.js's changeRepresentation() reused the exact same full-viewport onboarding overlay Screens 1/2 use for a brand-new project's first arrival for what should be a quick, in-context 'pick a different look' action mid-edit. Fixed with a new mode-change-look CSS class -- same overlay element/JS, but a compact ~560px centered modal card over a dimmed backdrop instead of a full takeover; verified via a DOM measurement (560x231px against a 1500x950 viewport) and a screenshot. (3) The zero-Place-Scene report was investigated, not reproduced -- a fresh Build with a genuinely zero-Place Scene already correctly hides the Artwork Place card via the existing holders:0 gating; most likely explanation is a stale, not-yet-rebuilt package on the user's live World, disclosed for confirmation rather than guessed at with an unverified second fix. Full regression across the entire existing Creator/Card-Platform Playwright suite and both goldenBuild.js suites passes unchanged. See CLAUDE.md's matching entry for the full account.
